facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this one. Bún Quậy Kiến-Xây on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is where Phu Quoc locals actually eat their noodles. Bún Quậy is the island's own dish: springy hand-rolled noodles, fresh seafood, light broth. 2,574 reviews and somehow still off most itineraries. Get here early. Bowls go fast. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the noodles hit the bowl at Bún Quậy Kiến-Xây. Fresh seafood, local broth, 2,574 people rated it 4.2 stars. Still not on the tourist map. Now you know.

instagram.caption: Locals eat here. Tourists don't know it exists. Bún Quậy Kiến-Xây, Phu Quoc's own noodle dish, 2,574 reviews. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Bowl of Bún Quậy Kiến-Xây incoming. This is what Phu Quoc locals actually order. 4.2 stars, zero tourist crowds.

tiktok.caption: The noodle shop Phu Quoc tourists walk past every day. Bún Quậy Kiến-Xây. 2,574 reviews. Go. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #LocalEats #VietnamTravel #TravelTips
